name: Mbld Dbl Choc Cheesecake Sq
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Line an 8 or 9 inch square baking pan with foil, extending the edges over the sides of the pan.
3. In a small mixing bowl, beat together butter and 1/2 cup sugar until smooth. Add salt.
4. Gradually stir in flour and cocoa until a soft dough forms.
5. Press the dough onto the bottom of the prepared pan.
6. In another mixing bowl, beat cream cheese and remaining 1/2 cup sugar until smooth. Add eggs and vanilla; blend well.
7. Mix melted chocolate chips into the batter until well combined.
8. Pour half of the chocolate-batter mixture over the dough.
9. Stir the remaining chocolate-batter mixture into the vanilla batter.
10. Gently pour the vanilla batter over the chocolate-batter, dropping tablespoons of the chocolate-batter on top for a marbled effect.
11. Bake in the preheated oven for 35 to 40 minutes or until the cheesecake is firm and slightly puffed. Let cool completely in the pan on a wire rack before refrigerating.
12. To serve, lift the cheesecake from the foil edges; cut into squares. Garnish as desired. Approximately 20 squares.
